verdict: AI displacement risk is moderate, with some tasks being automated but still requiring human expertise and judgment.

reasoning_steps.title: Routine Cognitive Tasks
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks 2, 4, and 8 from the O*NET task list involve analyzing user needs and software requirements, which are routine cognitive tasks that can be automated by current LLMs.

reasoning_steps.title: Creative Judgment Required
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks 3, 5, 6, 9, and 10 require human judgment and creativity, making them less susceptible to automation.

reasoning_steps.title: Regulatory Moat
reasoning_steps.body: While software development involves designing and testing systems, the regulatory moat is relatively weak due to the lack of strict licensure requirements for software developers.

adjacent_careers.name: Data Scientist
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Both software developers and data scientists work with complex systems, but data scientists focus more on extracting insights from data.

adjacent_careers.name: Quality Assurance Engineer
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Software developers and quality assurance engineers both test and validate software, but QA engineers focus more on ensuring software meets specific requirements.

recent_developments.headline: AI coding assistants see broad enterprise adoption
recent_developments.impact: Major firms report 25–30% of new code is now AI-generated and reviewed by engineers.

recent_developments.headline: Labor market data shows AI exposure rising for cognitive jobs
recent_developments.impact: Goldman Sachs and OECD analyses converge on roughly two-thirds of jobs being partially exposed.

recent_developments.headline: Education and tooling shift to assume AI is in the loop
recent_developments.impact: Universities and bootcamps update curricula to emphasize judgment and AI direction over rote production.

quotes.quote: Software engineering will be very different by the end of 2025. Most code will be written by AI, with human engineers reviewing and directing.
quotes.speaker: Dario Amodei
quotes.title: CEO, Anthropic

quotes.quote: AI is going to be the biggest technological shift of our lifetimes. Bigger than mobile, bigger than the web. Inside Microsoft, more than 30 percent of the code in some projects is now written by AI.
quotes.speaker: Satya Nadella
quotes.title: CEO, Microsoft

quotes.quote: More than a quarter of new code at Google is generated by AI, then reviewed and accepted by engineers.
quotes.speaker: Sundar Pichai
quotes.title: CEO, Google / Alphabet
